# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Create a Jenkins Pipeline that downloads build artifacts from external URLs provided as parameters and deploys them to production servers. This allows us to deploy pre-built artifacts from different sources (S3, Artifactory, HTTP servers) without rebuilding.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any

    parameters {
        string(name: 'ARTIFACT_URLS', defaultValue: '', description: 'Comma-separated list of artifact URLs to download')
        string(name: 'DEPLOY_DIR', defaultValue: '/path/to/deploy', description: 'Directory to deploy artifacts to')
        string(name: 'SERVER_USER', defaultValue: 'user', description: 'Username for the production server')
        string(name: 'SERVER_IP', defaultValue: '192.168.1.1', description: 'IP Address of the production server')
    }

    stages {
        stage('Download Artifacts') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def urls = params.ARTIFACT_URLS.tokenize(',')
                    urls.each { url ->
                        sh "curl -o ${DEPLOY_DIR}/${url.tokenize('/').last()} ${url}"
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Deploy Artifacts') {
            steps {
                script {
                    sh "scp ${DEPLOY_DIR}/* ${SERVER_USER}@${SERVER_IP}:${DEPLOY_DIR}"
                    sh "ssh ${SERVER_USER}@${SERVER_IP} 'chmod +x ${DEPLOY_DIR}/* && ${DEPLOY_DIR}/*'"
                }
            }
        }
    }

    post {
        success {
            echo "Deployment successful!"
        }
        failure {
            echo "Deployment failed."
        }
    }
}
